search:spring-boot-microservices-archite.content:
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `mvn spring-boot:run` to run a Spring Boot application.
  - `docker-compose up` to start services using Docker Compose.

- **Latest Versions**:
  - Spring Boot: 3.2.0
  - Spring Cloud: 2021.0.5

- **Key Config Options**:
  - `server.port`: Specifies the port on which the application will run.
  - `spring.application.name`: Defines the name of the application for service discovery.
  - `eureka.client.serviceUrl.defaultZone`: URL for Eureka server to register services.
  - `resilience4j.circuitbreaker.instances.<name>.registerHealthIndicator`: Configures a circuit breaker with health indicator.

- **Latest Version of Spring Boot**: 3.2.5
- **Latest Version of Spring Cloud**: 2023.0.1
- **CLI Command to Create a New Spring Boot Project**:
  ```bash
  spring init --dependencies=web,actuator my-microservice
  ```
- **Key Configuration Options for Service Discovery**:
  - `spring.cloud.discovery.enabled=true`
  - `spring.cloud.service-registry.auto-registration.enabled=true`
- **Key Configuration Options for API Gateway**:
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].id=example_route`
  - `spring.cloud.gateway.routes[0].uri=lb://my-service`
- **Key Configuration Options for Circuit Breaker**:
  - `spring.cloud.circuitbreaker.resilience4j.instances.myService.maxRequestsInPeriod=20`
  - `spring.cloud.circuitbreaker.resilience4j.instances.myService.slidingWindowSize=100`
- **Key Configuration Options for Data Management**:
  - `spring.datasource.url=jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/mydb`
  - `spring.datasource.username=root`
  - `spring.datasource.password=password`

- **Latest Version of Spring Boot**: 2.7.x
- **Key Config Options**:
  - `spring.application.name`: Specifies the name of the application.
  - `server.port`: Sets the port number on which the server will listen.
  - `eureka.client.serviceUrl.defaultZone`: URL for Eureka service discovery.
- **CLI Commands**:
  - `mvn spring-boot:run`: Runs a Spring Boot application from Maven.
  - `docker-compose up`: Starts services defined in docker-compose.yml.
  - `kubectl apply -f deployment.yaml`: Deploys applications to Kubernetes using YAML configuration files.

- Use `mvn spring-boot:run` to run Spring Boot applications.
- Update dependencies in `pom.xml` for the latest versions.
- Configure service discovery with Netflix Eureka using `<dependency>com.netflix.eureka:eureka-client</dependency>`.
- Set up load balancing with Ribbon by adding `<dependency>org.springframework.cloud:spring-cloud-starter-netflix-ribbon</dependency>`.
- Use Spring Cloud Gateway for API gateway: `<dependency>org.springframework.cloud:spring-cloud-starter-gateway</dependency>`.
- Configure circuit breaker with Hystrix using `<dependency>org.springframework.cloud:spring-cloud-starter-netflix-hystrix</dependency>`.
- Enable distributed tracing with Sleuth and Zipkin by adding `<dependency>org.springframework.cloud:spring-cloud-sleuth-zipkin</dependency>`.
- Use Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features: `<dependency>org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-actuator</dependency>`.
